headline: The *symbiotic* lifecycle approach
paragraph_1: Ladderup was founded on a simple belief: a financial advisor must be as invested in your outcome as you are. Since 2007, we've grown alongside our clients — not as transaction facilitators, but as long-term partners who understand each stage of the business lifecycle.
paragraph_2: Our approach integrates deep institutional relationships with bespoke advisory. We bring the rigour of a large investment bank and the agility of a boutique — an edge that mid-market India truly needs.

lifecycle_steps.title: Capital Formation
lifecycle_steps.description: Structured equity and debt solutions to fund growth initiatives

lifecycle_steps.title: M&A & Strategic Transactions
lifecycle_steps.description: Buy side, sell side, we bridge advisory for value-accretive deals
